ddls:
CREATE TABLE "migrations" (
  "migration_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each migration */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to verify the integrity of the migration */,
  "finished_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the migration was finished */,
  "migration_name" TEXT /* Name of the migration */,
  "logs" TEXT /* Log output of the migration process */,
  "rolled_back_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the migration was rolled back */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the migration started */,
  "applied_steps_count" INTEGER /* Number of steps applied in the migration */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the environment where the migration is applied */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the migration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the migration (e.g., pending, in progress, completed, rolled back) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who initiated the migration */,
  "roll_back_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rolling back the migration */,
  "rollback_steps_count" INTEGER /* Number of steps rolled back */,
  "migration_type" TEXT /* Type of migration (e.g., schema change, data migration) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migrations_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migrations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., development, staging, production) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the environment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the environment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* User who owns the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environments_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "migration_id" TEXT /* Migration ID */,
  "step_name" TEXT /* Name of the step */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of the step */,
  "step_order" INTEGER /* Order of the step within the migration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the step (e.g., pending, in progress, completed, failed) */,
  "started_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the step started */,
  "finished_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the step finished */,
  "logs" TEXT /* Log output of the step */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who initiated the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_steps_migration_id FOREIGN KEY ("migration_id") REFERENCES migrations ("migration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_steps_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Step ID */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who generated the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_logs_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES migration_steps ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., migration status, error report) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data of the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
